title: mentha × caroliana
intro: Mentha × caroliana, also known as Bowles' mint or Carol's mint, is a sterile hybrid mint species that is a natural cross between Mentha requienii and Mentha aquatica. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral compounds that can help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate headaches. The health benefits of Mentha × caroliana include its ability to ease nausea and improve respiratory function, making it a popular choice for herbal teas and remedies. Herbal preparations of Mentha × caroliana often include its leaves, which can be dried and used in teas, infusions, or added to topical creams and salves for their medicinal properties.
